summary: Iteration 25 - Global Prediction Accuracy Badge Testing Complete. 10/10 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: PredictionBadge on HomePage (Pink Diamond #1, 5/7 correct, 71.4%), Admin Dashboard KPI clickability (all stat cards, quick actions, alerts, workflow steps are buttons), ShareCard with BadgeInline component, LeaderboardPage fetches and passes badgeData.

minor.issue: Returns 500 for some matches (likely missing cricketdata_id)
Returns 500 for some matches (likely missing cricketdata_id)

backend.my_badge_with_auth: PASS - Returns rank, badge, total_correct, total_attempted, accuracy_pct, contests_count
backend.my_badge_values: PASS - Badge type matches rank (pink_diamond for #1)
backend.global_leaderboard_structure: PASS - Returns leaderboard array with all required fields

frontend.prediction_badge_homepage: PASS - PredictionBadge visible between greeting and dual banner
frontend.badge_diamond_icon: PASS - Pink Diamond SVG icon displayed
frontend.badge_accuracy_bar: PASS - Shows 71.4% accuracy with progress bar
frontend.badge_footer_text: PASS - Shows 'GLOBAL PREDICTION ACCURACY RANK' footer
frontend.admin_stat_cards_clickable: PASS - All 6 stat cards are buttons with chevron indicators
frontend.admin_quick_actions_clickable: PASS - All 4 quick action buttons with icons and chevrons
frontend.admin_alerts_clickable: PASS - Alert cards are buttons with chevron arrows
frontend.admin_workflow_steps_clickable: PASS - All 6 workflow steps are buttons with step numbers and chevrons
frontend.share_card_badge_inline: PASS - ShareCard shows BadgeInline with Pink Diamond #1, 71.4%, 5/7
frontend.leaderboard_passes_badge_to_sharecard: PASS - badgeData prop passed to ShareCard

critical_code_review_comments: contests.py: Global prediction leaderboard aggregation pipeline is well-designed, uses $unwind and $group efficiently
contests.py: Badge assignment logic correctly maps rank 1-3 to specific badges, 4+ to blue_crystal
contests.py: my-badge endpoint handles users with no predictions gracefully (returns null badge)
PredictionBadge.jsx: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes, handles both compact and full modes
PredictionBadge.jsx: BadgeInline export for ShareCard integration is clean and reusable
AdminDashboard.jsx: All KPI cards, quick actions, alerts, and workflow steps are now buttons with proper onClick handlers
AdminDashboard.jsx: Chevron indicators added to all clickable elements for visual affordance
ShareCard.jsx: Properly receives badgeData prop and conditionally renders BadgeInline
LeaderboardPage.jsx: Fetches badgeData from /contests/global/my-badge and passes to ShareCard
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user with 1 contest entry (5/7 correct, 71.4% accuracy, Rank #1 Pink Diamond)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified Global Prediction Accuracy Badge feature. Key findings: (1) GET /api/contests/global/my-badge returns user's rank, badge type, accuracy stats - requires auth, (2) GET /api/contests/global/prediction-leaderboard is public, returns ranked list with badge info, (3) PredictionBadge component renders on HomePage between greeting and dual banner, (4) Badge shows diamond SVG, rank, correct/attempted, accuracy bar, percentage, (5) Admin Dashboard KPI cards, quick actions, alerts, workflow steps are all clickable buttons with chevron indicators, (6) ShareCard receives badgeData prop and renders BadgeInline component, (7) LeaderboardPage fetches badgeData and passes to ShareCard. Admin user has Pink Diamond #1 badge with 5/7 correct (71.4%).
